Neuroptech | 457 followers on LinkedIn. Where Vision Meets Innovation  | This is not just a community
I believe one day we all Optometrists will have such a repotated position in india 
People will love to be an optometrist, and an optometrist will be proud to be for themselves

Our team tries to contribute what it takes to build up this course in such a level where Optometrist will learn and know about themselves, we provide webinars, recorded lectures, modules, foundation for new on ground optometrist also, quizzes and events etc

About us

This is not just a community I believe one day we all Optometrists will have such a repotated position in india People will love to be an optometrist, and an optometrist will be proud to be for themselves Our team tries to contribute what it takes to build up this course in such a level where Optometrist will learn and know about themselves, we provide webinars, recorded lectures, modules, foundation for new on ground optometrist also, quizzes and events etc

    Here is the link below for Day 2 of 1 day 1 syndrome challenge by Sahiba laik go visit and find out interesting facts about Circadian Rhythm sleep Disorder https://lnkd.in/gKmRZjag

    2 2 Comments
    Like Comment Share
  • Neuroptech

    457 followers

    14h
    • Report this post

    Huge congratulations to Sahiba Laik for being the Day 2 Honoree of the NEUROPTECH “1 Day, 1 Syndrome Challenge”! 🌟 Your presentation on *Circadian Rhythm Sleep Disorder* beautifully reflected dedication, clarity, and true academic passion. The way you simplified a complex topic and connected it with ocular significance made learning engaging and impactful for everyone. 👏✨ At NEUROPTECH, we believe knowledge grows when it is shared — and today, you truly inspired that spirit. Keep shining, keep learning, and keep inspiring future innovators in Optometry and Neuro-Optometry! 💜🧠👁️ #NEUROPTECH #SyndromeChallenge #Optometry #NeuroOptometry #LearningBeyondLimits #FutureHealthcareLeaders #CircadianRhythmSleepDisorder #WomenInHealthcare #AcademicExcellence #KnowledgeSharing

    1
    Like Comment Share
  • Neuroptech

    457 followers

    1d
    • Report this post

    Go through this link below to visit Marfan syndrome for 1 day 1 syndrome challenge excellent work done my Dr Rupali kapoor https://lnkd.in/gemfwW6C

    10
    Like Comment Share
  • Neuroptech

    457 followers

    1d
    • Report this post

    🌟 Celebrating Excellence in Learning & Innovation 🌟 Proud to appreciate Dr. Rupali Kapoor for her outstanding contribution on Day 1 of the NEUROPTECH “1 Day, 1 Syndrome Challenge.” Her well-structured and insightful presentation on *Marfan Syndrome* beautifully highlighted the ocular significance of the condition with clarity and dedication. 👁️✨ This initiative is not just about studying syndromes — it is about creating awareness, strengthening clinical understanding, and inspiring future optometrists to think deeper and learn better. Your hard work, confidence, and enthusiasm truly set a motivating example for everyone in the community. Keep shining, keep exploring, and keep inspiring! 💜 #NEUROPTECH #Optometry #MarfanSyndrome #EyeHealth #ClinicalLearning #FutureOptometrists #MedicalEducation #HealthcareInnovation #StudentLeadership #VisionCare

    10
    Like Comment Share
  • Neuroptech

    457 followers

    1w
    • Report this post

    🚨 NEUROPTECH LIVE CLASS ANNOUNCEMENT 🚨 👁️ Refractive Error Series – Class 1 📘 Topic: MYOPIA Join us this Sunday for the very first session of our refractive error lecture series, where we will begin with one of the most important and common visual conditions — Myopia (Nearsightedness). 🧠 In this session, you will learn about: ✔️ Introduction to refractive errors ✔️ What is Myopia? ✔️ Causes & risk factors ✔️ Symptoms & diagnosis ✔️ Prevention & management ✔️ Clinical significance in Optometry 📅 Date: 10 May 2026 ⏰ Time: 7:00 PM 📍 Platform: YouTube Live 🎯 This is the 1st class of the refractive error series. Further types of refractive errors including: 🔹 Hypermetropia 🔹 Astigmatism 🔹 Presbyopia …and their clinical approaches will be covered lecture by lecture in upcoming sessions. 📢 YouTube Live link will be provided soon. 👨🏫 Hosted by: Mohammad Adnan Founder – NEUROPTECH ✨ Where Vision Meets Innovation

    12
    Like Comment Share
  • Neuroptech

    457 followers

    1w Edited
    • Report this post

    🧠👁️ *Announcing a New Learning Initiative by NEUROPTECH* 👁️🧠 We are thrilled to introduce the **“30 Days – 30 Syndromes Challenge”**, an engaging academic series focused on enhancing clinical understanding in neuro-optometry and eye care. 📌 *Concept:* One Day – One Syndrome Participants will explore and present clinically significant syndromes such as Horner Syndrome, Axenfeld-Rieger Syndrome, ICE Syndrome, and more. 📅 *Start Date:* 15 May ⏳ *Duration:* 30 Days ✍️ *Participation Guidelines:* • Prepare a concise write-up on a white sheet • Cover Definition, Ocular Significance, and Key Features • Maintain clarity and creativity Share your work at neuroptech official mail id with your contact number 👇🏻 neuroptech@gmail.com 🌟 *Highlights:* • Selected entries will be featured on Neuroptech’s official social media platforms • Participants will receive recognition with their name and photograph • Opportunity to build academic visibility and consistency This initiative aims to foster a strong clinical mindset and encourage continuous learning within the optometry community. 👨⚕️ *Founder:* Mohammad Adnan 👨⚕️ *Co-Founder:* Mohammad Asad 🚀 Let’s learn, grow, and build together. #Neuroptech #Optometry #NeuroOptometry #EyeCare #ClinicalLearning #MedicalEducation #Students #Healthcare #Innovation

    28 1 Comment
    Like Comment Share

    Successfully conducted our 2nd NEUROPTECH Community Eye Health Check-Up Camp at 📍Haiderpur Badli, Delhi We are committed to delivering accessible and quality eye care services, including: • Visual Acuity Assessment • Accurate Refraction Services • Color Vision Assessment • Easy Referral System for advanced care • Basic Medications Support • Affordable Spectacles at highly effective prices Continuing our mission to make vision care simple, affordable, and reachable for all 👁️✨ Neuroptech Mohd. Adnan Mohd Asad #NEUROPTECH #visiona #communityhealth

    Special Thanks We extend our heartfelt gratitude to Ashok Sawhney Foundation and NIIT Foundation for their incredible support in making this eye care camp with Neuroptech a success. Your collaboration made a real impact, and we look forward to many more meaningful initiatives together. 🚀

    457 followers

    1mo
    • Report this post

    🔥 Successfully completed first ever eye camp Neuroptech has successfully conducted its first-ever Eye Care Camp, marking the beginning of our community outreach journey. Led by our dedicated core team, this was not just a screening camp—we provided comprehensive services including refraction, pupillary examination, orthoptics, anterior & posterior segment evaluation, retina check, and proper diagnosis with referral. special Thanks to Saket Singh our outreach head 📍 Rangpuri Pahari, New Delhi 🚀 This is just the beginning of many more impactful camps ahead. founder :- Mohd. Adnan Co founder:- Mohd Asad

      We are excited to announce the upcoming Eye Check-Up Camp on 6 April 2026. This camp will be conducted by a dedicated and experienced core team, and it marks the beginning of our main series of community eye care camps. This is not just a basic screening camp. location:- G4JF+QQ7, shiv mandir Rd, Rangpuri Pahari, Rangpuri, New Delhi, Delhi 110037 *We aim to provide comprehensive eye care services, including:* 1. Vision Assessment 2. Refraction 3. Full Pupillary Examination 4. Orthoptics Evaluation 5. Anterior & Posterior Segment Evaluation 6. Retina Examination 7. Diagnosis & Proper Referral (if required) This initiative is designed to deliver complete clinical exposure, better patient care, and active engagement of the Neuroptech team. This is just the beginning — We will soon expand these camps on a larger scale, involving the entire Neuroptech team for impactful outreach.
